reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of the management and their operation.

review_content.Placements: No useful placements are provided by my college. All placements that we got are for call centre jobs which are not relevant for us. There are CA students who are studying in the college but there are no relevant placements for account students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. There is a canteen and a play area for indoor games. It provides food. Classrooms are well-maintained and labs are also well-maintained. The only problem is the management. Wi-Fi is also a problem there and labs do not have internet access.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. In Mathematics, Electronics, Computer Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a good infrastructure and faculty offering the best extra curricular activities.

review_content.Placements: 30% of the students will be in the placed groups which totally depends on their marks. The highest package offered is 3 Lacs per annum and we don't get great placements in our college. I don't have an idea about the companies coming in our college as the placements depend on the groups of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the college, we have a very decent and good infrastructure having clean surroundings and well maintained classrooms and washrooms. We also have a library access to the students where we can ge books related to our course. We have labs for every stream along with computer labs in the college. There is no hostel available in the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities, and the faculty was very friendly.

review_content.Placements: The college has plenty of placements every year. The college has tied up with many companies; even the college helps us learn how to crack the interview and get placed in a good company. The companies definitely recruit students with good skills and academic excellence.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college was updating itself every year as students passed forward. They are aware of having good infrastructure and well-maintained premises. The classrooms are well painted and ventilated. The restrooms are well cleaned and maintained. They have a computer lab, a seminar hall, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A good place to study and get placed in big companies.

review_content.Placements: There are a lot of placement opportunities, and those are in big companies. There are many chances of getting placed in different roles in many companies, according to the interviews we had with those companies at the college during the final year. So it's a good place to join.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building looks so beautiful, and the infrastructure is good. A comfortable environment to study. Large steps that can be used at a time by many people. No need to wait in a long line. No hostel facility is available. A library is available with various books needed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. In Mathematics, Electronics, Computer Science - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college.

review_content.Placements: In our course, almost 65 students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc., visited our campus. Almost 30% of students got internships. The top role offered was a software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not available throughout the campus. Our classrooms were excellent and well-maintained. The hostel facilities were not available. A canteen was available. The quality of food served in the canteen was good. Sports were available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. In Chemistry, Bio-Chemistry, Bio-Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: More than 80% of students got placed in companies and others went for higher studies. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Our college does not provide internships.Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and many startup companies. Top roles offered are according to the course and students' performance in interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in our college. The infrastructure of our college is very good. The whole college premises are very clean. Our college has a canteen. There is no hostel facility in our college. Our college provides only a few sports and medical facilities.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: How is the scope of microbiology?
faqs.answer:
The scope of microbiology is huge because of the involvement of microbiology in various fields such as Pharmacy, Medicine, clinical research, agriculture, dairy industry, water industry, nanotechnology & chemical technology. 
A person who specialises in this field is called a Microbiologist. Some of the Jobs in this field are mentioned below -
1. Biomedical scientist
2. Bio technologist
3. Clinical research associate
4. Food technologist
5. Healthcare scientist, immunology
6. Medicinal chemist
7. Microbiologist
8. Nano technologist.

reviews.review_heading:
Misleading placements, average facilities, but helpful professors and decent academics
.
reviews.review_text: The government hostels were a good place to stay. They provide separate accommodations for men and women. The college has Wi-Fi, but it's not for students. The classrooms are decent, and the library and librarians are good and supportive.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a friendly environment and the faculty members are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge lab and each student is provided with a personal computer. The lab has an internet connection, which is required by the computers. The college also has a library, from which you can read any book you choose. Apart from academics, there are a large number of extracurricular activities, along with sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college as per the city.
reviews.review_text: Due to the old computers and peripherals and the lack of internet access in the college, it's a little difficult to use the labs. Overall, the classrooms are average, and the benches are not that good. Hostels are available, but they aren't so good, and there's no mess, but the canteen is great.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dolat-Usha Institute of Applied Sciences & Dhiru-Sarla Institute of Mngt and Commerce.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in this college. Practical laboratories are available for doing practicals. The books are also available in the library. The facilities are good in this college. Sports are also available. Every department has its laboratories like chemistry laboratories, microbiology laboratories, and computer science laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: Good college worthy to join.
reviews.review_text: In dolat Usha institute of Science BCA have a very good faculty. All the professors are highly qualified and have Ph.D. Degree and with good teaching experience. Science college is affiliated with white vnsgu, BCA course is provided with University. The course is a little-bit old type compared to new technology. College also has a common canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the course, college.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, Microbiology Laboratory, Chemistry laboratory, PGDMLT laboratory, Botany laboratory, Zoology laboratory. Classroom are available with projectors attached in it and library is available in this college. There is good quality of food  available in the mess and canteen along with the medical facilities in case of emergency is there.

reviews.review_heading: Dolat Usha is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The environment is natural in our college because there are lots of trees. There is no free Wi-Fi for students, and only teachers use that. Laboratories are good enough, but they need some more equipment, which is not available. Students have to compromise in the laboratory. However, classrooms are good enough. The library is not huge and even small. The playground is not much huge, but it's fine. I feel good studying there.

review_content.Placements: Minimum 90% of the students in this college are doing the job in the hospital. Minimum Rs.12,000/- salary will give to all the students in starting. Manager roles were offered to the students, and many doctors and managers also come to our hospital for the seminar. There is a placement cell which is very useful for all the students. 100% of the students got the internship from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, air conditioning classrooms, emergency help, sports, games, many programmes like world health day, international mother language day, teacher's day and much more. The food quality is very good, and the price is also low. Our teachers are very frank. Overall, the college is very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Clinical Psychology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty and fake placement guarantee.

review_content.Placements: College didn't give any proper placements. They choose very poor workplaces which are not fit for our stream. They just show those opportunities for their own business. No seniors got proper benefits. If fact faculty did partiality to choose candidates. There's mostly part time with very less salary, in fact they cannot bring any hospital or clinic base placements. They gave me a job recruitment in an IT office where the work is on animation. So the entire placement facilities are false here.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facilities. Library is big with limited books. No Wi-Fi. Canteen has started just 1 year ago. Foods are good but prices are too high. Medical facilities and sports are not organized by them, students play games in the field by their own.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Clinical Psychology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I'm happy to be a part of this college.

review_content.Placements: I am now working as a research assistant at this college after my studies. All our batchmates got placed in some schools as school counselors and in NGOs as counselors. Other students are pursuing higher education like B.Ed in special education, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratory was available with all the needed practical equipment. Library was provided with all the books related to the topics. Our campus connected students with nature.
review_content.Faculty: All the faculty members in our college were knowledgeable, cooperative, and helpful. review_summary.college_name: The Gayatri Chetna Foundation, Narendrapur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I recommend anyone to go this college for your management course. I am really satisfied.

content.Placements: Minimum 90% of the students in this college are doing the job in the hospital. Minimum Rs.12,000/- salary will give to all the students in starting. Manager roles were offered to the students, and many doctors and managers also come to our hospital for the seminar. There is a placement cell which is very useful for all the students. 100% of the students got the internship from the college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, air conditioning classrooms, emergency help, sports, games, many programmes like world health day, international mother language day, teacher's day and much more. The food quality is very good, and the price is also low. Our teachers are very frank. Overall, the college is very good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Clinical Psychology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty and fake placement guarantee.

content.Placements: College didn't give any proper placements. They choose very poor workplaces which are not fit for our stream. They just show those opportunities for their own business. No seniors got proper benefits. If fact faculty did partiality to choose candidates. There's mostly part time with very less salary, in fact they cannot bring any hospital or clinic base placements. They gave me a job recruitment in an IT office where the work is on animation. So the entire placement facilities are false here.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facilities. Library is big with limited books. No Wi-Fi. Canteen has started just 1 year ago. Foods are good but prices are too high. Medical facilities and sports are not organized by them, students play games in the field by their own.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Clinical Psychology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I'm happy to be a part of this college.

content.Placements: I am now working as a research assistant at this college after my studies. All our batchmates got placed in some schools as school counselors and in NGOs as counselors. Other students are pursuing higher education like B.Ed in special education, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratory was available with all the needed practical equipment. Library was provided with all the books related to the topics. Our campus connected students with nature.
content.Faculty: All the faculty members in our college were knowledgeable, cooperative, and helpful. They explained all the topics practically which helped students understand the topic clearly. They were friendly and cleared the doubts of the students very well. I'm thankful to them for their support.

review_content.Placements: College placement is not very good; there are only a few companies that hire students. In my batch, only two companies have come for placement with a low package. If you go for placement, this college is not good.

Check below for detailed steps for Trilochan Netralaya admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Trilochan Netralaya application process is conducted in an offline mode. Candidates willing to apply for admission to UG course at the institute can visit the admission office in in-person and collect the application form and prospectus by paying INR 600.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Trilochan Netralaya admissions are merit-based. Candidates are offered admission based on merit of Class 12. To be eligible for the course, candidates must pass their higher school in the stream of Science.
Step 3: Final Admission
After the final selection, candidates must submit their documents for document verification by the admission officer of the institution. Later on, candidates must pay the 1st installment of the fees.
